name: esoteric-elucidation
description: Explain unfamiliar code, systems, or domains by orienting in plain English, scoping blast radius, and walking concrete data flows before diving into implementation detail. Repo-agnostic.

interface.shortDescription: Explain unfamiliar systems with clear context
interface.longDescription: Orient engineers in unfamiliar codebases with plain-English context, blast-radius analysis, and concrete execution flows.
defaultPrompt: Explain this unfamiliar codebase or system.
